task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates or opens the new configuration file based on the template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command like 'cp run.sumocfg run_fcd.sumocfg' or a text editor (nano, vim, gedit) open with the file path '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_fcd.sumocfg'.

task_completion.description: Verify the simulation time is set from 0 to 500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the <time> block in the text editor showing <begin value="0"/> and <end value="500"/>.

task_completion.description: Verify the FCD output path and period are correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for <fcd-output value="/home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_fcd.xml"/> and a period setting like <fcd-output.period value="1.0"/> or <device.fcd.period value="1.0"/> in the configuration file.

task_completion.description: Verify the tripinfo output path is correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for <tripinfo-output value="/home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos.xml"/> in the configuration file.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent runs the SUMO simulation in headless mode using the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command starting with 'sumo ' (not sumo-gui) followed by '-c /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_fcd.sumocfg' and the subsequent SUMO execution logs showing steps progressing up to 500.

task_completion.description: Verify the output files were successfully generated with appropriate file sizes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command like 'ls -lh /home/ga/SUMO_Output/' showing 'pasubio_fcd.xml' with a file size significantly larger than 100KB (likely in the MBs) and 'tripinfos.xml' present in the directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the headless 'sumo' command and did not launch the SUMO GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SUMO GUI application window should not be visible in any screenshots; only terminal execution should be seen.

integrity.description: Ensure the output files were generated by running the simulation, not manually created.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for SUMO step logs in the terminal. There should be no commands like 'touch /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_fcd.xml' or 'echo ... > .../tripinfos.xml' used to fake the outputs.

integrity.description: Ensure the original input and report settings were retained from the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: When the config file is open in an editor, the <input> section containing references to net-file and route-files should still be intact and not deleted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration file is /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_fcd.sumocfg. It must contain time settings (begin=0, end=500), FCD output (/home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_fcd.xml) with a period of 1.0, and tripinfo output (/home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos.xml). The simulation must be run headlessly (using 'sumo', not 'sumo-gui'). A successful run will generate an FCD XML file significantly larger than 100 KB (typically ~28.2 MB).
